title: ECL context-delta v1
description: The context_delta object embedded in an ECL envelope. Defined by ECL v1.0 §4.

token_budget.description: Contract-declared maximum token count for this envelope.

tokens_used.description: Sender's good-faith estimate of tokens used. MUST be <= token_budget. ECL v1.0 §4.1.1.

input_handles.description: Relative paths or ecl:// URIs the receiver can re-read on demand. ECL v1.0 §4.3.

summary.description: Prose describing what is new since parent_id. SHOULD be <= 200 tokens. ECL v1.0 §4.1.3.
